ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postcodes" (
  "postcode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postcode */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode value */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the postcode belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the postcode was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the postcode was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postcode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postcodes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the borough was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "postcode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the postcode the neighborhood belongs to */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_postcode_id FOREIGN KEY ("postcode_id") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "postcode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the postcode the coordinate belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the postcode */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the postcode */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_postcode_id FOREIGN KEY ("postcode_id") REFERENCES postcodes ("postcode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the neighborhood */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_planning" (
  "urban_planning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban planning entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the urban planning data belongs to */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use of the neighborhood (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning regulations of the neighborhood */,
  "development_status" TEXT /* Development status of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the urban planning data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the urban planning data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("urban_planning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_planning_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the transportation data belongs to */,
  "public_transit" TEXT /* Public transit options available in the neighborhood */,
  "bike_lanes" TEXT /* Presence of bike lanes in the neighborhood */,
  "road_network" TEXT /* Road network of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transportation data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transportation data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_services" (
  "public_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public service entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the public service data belongs to */,
  "schools" TEXT /* Presence of schools in the neighborhood */,
  "hospitals" TEXT /* Presence of hospitals in the neighborhood */,
  "community_centers" TEXT /* Presence of community centers in the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the public service data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the public service data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("public_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_services_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., urban planner, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhood_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood the history belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., boundary update, name change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhood_history_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borough_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough the history belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., boundary update, name change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borough_history_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytic_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., demographic, urban planning) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., boundary, point, polygon) */,
  "layer_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., API, CSV, database) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
